title: Characterizing Schur-concave commutative copulas as the closure of associative ones
abstract: Let $\mathcal{C}_a$ denote the class of associative copulas, and let $\overline{\mathcal{C}}_a$ be the closure, in the uniform metric $d_\infty$, of the convex hull of $\mathcal{C}_a$ . It is known that $\mathcal{C}_a \subseteq \mathcal{C}_{SC}$, the class of Schur-concave commutative copulas. We prove the reverse inclusion, establishing $\overline{\mathcal{C}}_a = \mathcal{C}_{SC}$.
